text: By the mount
tl: Wat-Toor

text: And [by] a Book inscribed
tl: Wa-kitaabim mastoor

text: In parchment spread open
tl: Fee raqqim manshoor

text: And [by] the frequented House
tl: Wal-baitil ma'moor

text: And [by] the ceiling [i.e., heaven] raised high
tl: Wassaqfil marfoo'

text: And [by] the sea set on fire,
tl: Wal-bahril masjoor

text: Indeed, the punishment of your Lord will occur.
tl: Inna 'azaaba Rabbika lawaaqi'

text: Of it there is no preventer.
tl: Maa lahoo min daafi'

text: On the Day the heaven will sway with circular motion
tl: Yawma tamoorus samaaa'u mawraa

text: And the mountains will pass on, departing -
tl: Wa-taseerul jibaalu sairaa

text: Then woe, that Day, to the deniers,
tl: Fawailuien yawma-'izil lil-mukaazzibeen

text: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.
tl: Allazeena hum fee khawdien yal'aboon

text: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],
tl: Yawma yuda'-'oona ilaa naari jahannama da'-'aa

text: \"This is the Fire which you used to deny.
tl: Haazihin naarul latee kuntum bihaa tukazziboon

text: Then is this magic, or do you not see?
tl: Afasihrun haazaaaa am antum laa tubsiroon

text: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do.\"
tl: Islawhaa fasbirooo aw laa tasbiroo sawaaa'un 'alaikum innamaa tujzawna maa kuntum ta'maloon

text: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and pleasure,
tl: Innal muttaqeena fee jannaatinw Wa-na'eem

text: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire.
tl: Faakiheena bimaaa aataahum rabbuhum Wa-waqaahum rabbuhum 'azaabal jaheem

text: [They will be told], \"Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do.\"
tl: Kuloo washraboo haneee-'am bimaa kuntum ta'maloon

text: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.
tl: Muttaki'eena 'alaa sururim masfoofatinw Wa-zawwaj-naahum bihoorin 'een

text: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained.
tl: Wallazeena aamanoo wattaba'at-hum zurriyyatuhum bieemaanin alhaqnaa bihim zurriyyatahum Wa-maaa alatnaahum min 'amalihim min shai'; kullum ri'im bimaa kasaba raheen

text: And We will provide them with fruit and meat from whatever they desire.
tl: Wa-amdadnaahum bifaa-kihatinw Wa-lahmim mimmaa yashtahoon

text: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin.
tl: Yatanaaza'oona feehaa kaasal laa laghwun feehaa Wa-laa taaseem

text: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected.
tl: Wa-yatoofu 'alaihim ghilmaanul lahum ka-annahum lu'lu'um maknoon

text: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.
tl: Wa-aqbala ba'duhum 'alaa ba'dien yatasaaa'aloon

text: They will say, \"Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allāh].
tl: Qaalooo innaa kunnaa qablu feee ahlinaa mushfiqeen

text: So Allāh conferred favor upon us and protected us from the punishment of the Scorching Fire.
tl: Famannnal laahu 'alainaa Wa-waqaanaa 'azaabas samoom

text: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful.\"
tl: Innaa kunnaa min qablu nad'oohu innahoo huwal barrur raheem

text: So remind, [O Muḥammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman.
tl: Fazakkir famaaa anta bini'mati rabbika bikaahininw Wa-laa majnoon

text: Or do they say [of you], \"A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time\"?
tl: Am yaqooloona shaa'irun natarabbasu bihee raibal manoon

text: Say, \"Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters.\"
tl: Qul tarabbasoo fa-innee ma'akum minal mutarabbiseen

text: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?
tl: Am taamuruhum ahlaamuhum bihaazaaa am hum qawmun taaghoon

text: Or do they say, \"He has made it up\"? Rather, they do not believe.
tl: Am yaqooloona taqawwalah; bal laa yu'minoon

text: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful.
tl: Falyaatoo bihadeesim misliheee in kaanoo saadiqeen

text: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?
tl: Am khuliqoo min ghairi shai'in am humul khaaliqoon

text: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain.
tl: Am khalaqus samaawaati wal-ard; bal laa yooqinoon

text: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?
tl: Am 'indahum khazaaa'inu rabbika am humul musaitiroon

text: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority [i.e., proof].
tl: Am lahum sullamuien yastami'oona feehi falyaati mustami'uhum bisultaanim mubeen

text: Or has He daughters while you have sons?
tl: Am lahul banaatu Wa-lakumul banoon

text: Or do you, [O Muḥammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?
tl: Am tas'aluhum ajran fahum mim maghramim musqaloon

text: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?
tl: Am 'indahumul ghaibu fahum yaktuboon

text: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan.
tl: Am yureedoona kaidan fallazeena kafaroo humul makeedoon

text: Or have they a deity other than Allāh? Exalted is Allāh above whatever they associate with Him.
tl: Am lahum ilaahun ghairul laa; subhaanal laahi 'ammaa yushrikoon

text: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, \"[It is merely] clouds heaped up.\"
tl: Wa-ien yaraw kisfam minas samaaa'i saaqitaien yaqooloo sahaabum markoom

text: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible -
tl: Fazarhum hatta yulaaqoo yawmahumul lazee feehi yus'aqoon

text: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.
tl: Yawma laa yughnee 'anhum kaidumhum shai'anw Wa-laa hum yunsaroon

text: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know.
tl: Wa-inna lillazeena zalamoo 'azaaban doona zalika Wa-laakinna aksarahum laa ya'lamoon

text: And be patient, [O Muḥammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes [i.e., sight]. And exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord when you arise
tl: Wasbir lihukmi rabbika fa-innaka bi-a'yuninaa Wa-sabbih bihamdi rabbika heena taqoom

text: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after [the setting of] the stars.
tl: Wa-minal laili fasabbihhu Wa-idbaaran nujoom
